moment_gists.why: Early conversation is usually a back-and-forth to find common ground. Trading turns roughly evenly signals interest in them, not just your topic.
Personal disclosures usually land better once there is a little rapport, and they land warmer framed as a neutral fact than as a warning about yourself.
A tiny acknowledgement often resets a stalled moment before you move on.
